title: strophanthus divergens
intro: Strophanthus divergens, also known as the African dogbane, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include the presence of the cardiac glycoside strophanthin, a powerful heart stimulant. The health benefits of Strophanthus divergens include its ability to increase heart rate and contractility, making it a potential treatment for heart failure and other cardiovascular conditions. Strophanthus divergens can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dried root extract, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine, although it should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potency.
